title: Trump comments on Susie Wiles recent diagnosis
shortDescription: President Donald Trump says Susie Wiles will recover well after a breast cancer diagnosis and calls her an "amazing fighter."

title: Trump reveals congressman's terminal diagnosis
shortDescription: Trump said retiring GOP Rep. Neal Dunn, R-Florida, would have been "dead by June" before he had White House doctors intervene.

title: Democrats refer Kristi Noem to DOJ for investigation into perjury
shortDescription: Top congressional Democrats referred evidence to the DOJ March 16 that they say indicates DHS Secretary Kristi Noem lied to Congress.

title: What to know about Susie Wiles, Trump's chief of staff
shortDescription: White House Chief of Staff Susie Wiles, has been diagnosed with breast cancer, President Donald Trump announced. Here's what to know about her.

title: Susie Wiles, White House chief of staff, diagnosed with breast cancer
shortDescription: Wiles will continue to serve in her role at the White House during treatment for early-stage breast cancer, the president said Monday.

title: This SAVE America Act could permanently reshape elections
shortDescription: The SAVE America Act would require states to share voter rolls with the federal government. What does that means for elections?

title: Trump calls for protection of Strait of Hormuz
shortDescription: Trump pushes countries to help secure the Strait of Hormuz amid rising Middle East tensions and stalled international commitments.

title: Allies snub Trump's call for backup against 'paper tiger' Iran: Live
shortDescription: U.S. gas prices climbed higher over the weekend, with the national average price at $3.69, up more than 70 cents from three weeks ago.

title: Midterm primaries continue this week. Here's what's up for grabs.
shortDescription: Illinois voters go to polls on March 17.

title: From Omarosa to Soleimani, requesters seek Trump admin's docs
shortDescription: Hundreds of requests hit the National Archives in the seconds and minutes after Trump's library opened Jan. 20, 2026.

title: Can the SAVE America Act actually pass Congress?
shortDescription: Trump says the SAVE Act would “guarantee” GOP wins in the midterms. What's in the bill and does it any real chance of passing.

title: President Trump says US could soon reach deal with Cuba
shortDescription: "Cuba also wants to make a deal, and I think we will pretty soon either make a deal or do whatever we have to do," Trump told reporters on March 15.

title: Trump tells unpaid TSA agents to 'go to work' amid shutdown
shortDescription: President Donald Trump encouraged TSA agents to "go to work" amid long wait times and a partial government shutdown that has left them without pay.

title: A message from Trump? A symbol of peace was cut from US dimes.
shortDescription: The design was finalized in 2024, before Trump took office. The artist and U.S. Mint say it symbolizes the early U.S. quest for freedom from Britain.

title: Will RFK Jr.'s MAHA voters ditch GOP in midterm elections?
shortDescription: Trump's recent executive order to increase the production of glyphosate might derail MAHA voters' support for the GOP, the movement’s leaders say.
